name: A11y-dialog
description: A script to make modal dialogs accessible to assistive technology users.

name: A11y-toggle
description: A script to make accessible content toggles to assistive technology users.

name: Browserhacks
description: An extensive list of browser specific hacks.

name: Circularray
description: A fast circular array implementation in JavaScript.

name: Focusable Selectors
description: A micro-lib exporting an array of CSS selectors for focusable HTML elements.

name: node-legofy
description: A script to convert an image into a mosaic of LEGO pieces.

name: Outline Audit
description: A script to audit the outline of a document.

name: Par Odin! Solver
description: A solver for the puzzle board game “Par Odin!”.

name: react-a11y-dialog
description: A React component wrapper around a11y-dialog.

name: react-a11y-disclosure
description: A small React hook to build accessible disclosure widgets.

name: Sass Compatibility
description: A project collecting incompatibilities between different Sass engines.

name: Sass Guidelines
description: An opinionated styleguide for writing sane, maintainable and scalable Sass. Sass Boilerplate was a starter repo that applied the same architecture and layout as a clone-and-go scaffold.

name: Sass libraries
description: A family of small pure-Sass libraries to extend the language with all sorts of features.

name: Selectors Explained
description: A CSS selector to plain English converter.

name: Simplified JavaScript Jargon
description: A community-driven attempt at explaining JavaScript concepts and buzzwords.
